findings.title: Session tokens stored unencrypted in localStorage
findings.runtime_scope_justification: src/auth/session.js runs in the browser, directly exposed to user input.
findings.failure_mode_justification: Any XSS vector can exfiltrate the session token from localStorage.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: Line 42 writes the raw token to localStorage without encryption.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Traced from login handler at auth/login.js:10 through session.create() to localStorage.setItem() at session.js:42.
findings.effort_to_fix_justification: Move to httpOnly secure cookies or encrypt at rest with a per-session key.
findings.issue: Tokens written to localStorage without encryption.
findings.why_it_matters: Any XSS vector can exfiltrate the session.
findings.suggested_fix: Move to httpOnly secure cookies or encrypt at rest with a per-session key.
